description: Time off due to cultural, nationalistic, or religious holidays that are legislated in Canada
name: Statutory Holiday

description: Time off for staff who are on a shift rotation schedule
name: Off Rotation (Full Day)

description: Regular hours worked for pay where on-the-job training took place
name: Training

description: Hourly staff who work 0 hours in a week create this entry to submit an empty time sheet.
name: Full Week Off

description: Time off due to provincially-mandated vacation
name: Vacation

description: If an employee has worked more than 44 hours in a week, the overage can be banked by using this code. In this way the employee will not be paid for the time for this reporting period, but it will be available to use later.
name: Add Overtime to Bank

description: Personal paid time off granted by the company
name: PPTO

description: Time off to experience losing someone important
name: Bereavement

description: Employees can request payout of banked overtime (in dollars) using this code. Only one entry per timesheet is allowed.
name: Request Overtime Payout
